title: Validating JSON Data with Regular Expressions
scenario: Create a JSON artifact representing a JSON data object with a complex structure. The output should be a valid regular expression used for validating the JSON data. The expression should correctly match all elements and attributes as per the JSON data structure.
constraints: Must be a valid regular expression
Must correctly match all elements and attributes in the JSON data
Must adhere to the regular expression syntax and semantics

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated regular expression is valid.
Verifies if the generated regular expression correctly matches all elements and attributes in the JSON data.
Evaluates if the generated regular expression adheres to the regular expression syntax and semantics.
